overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail. The character travels from a rocky hillside path into a denser birch forest during golden hour lighting with long shadows and warm tones.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: Large moss-covered rock face forming a wall along the right side of the trail
Narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small stones
Dense forest of pine and deciduous trees covering the rolling hills
White and yellow wildflowers growing along the trail edges
Rolling forested hills visible through the morning mist

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a rocky embankment on the right and open forest on the left. The path winds through mixed vegetation with wildflowers and shrubs under partly cloudy skies, with warm golden hour light casting long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with panoramic hill views

events.description: character stops walking and rotates to face the camera, surveying the surrounding landscape
character turns back to face forward and resumes walking along the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses on the trail to look around at the forest and distant hills, revealing his face and the detailed armor before continuing

entered.detail: Sparse trees visible in the middle distance as the view opens up
Valley with atmospheric morning mist visible when character turns

segments.scene_description: The character pauses on the trail and the camera rotates to reveal his face and the expansive forest landscape behind him. He surveys the misty valley and distant hills before turning back to continue his journey, leaving the rocky embankment behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: birch forest trail with dense undergrowth

events.description: trail enters denser birch forest section with white-barked trees becoming prominent on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the sun-dappled birch forest, moving deeper into the woods with steady pace

entered.detail: White-barked birch trees with sparse leaves lining the trail
Thick grass and colorful shrubs including orange and red vegetation

segments.scene_description: The trail continues into a denser section of forest dominated by white birch trees and colorful undergrowth. The path remains clear as Geralt walks through the dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, with the rocky terrain now replaced by grassy banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from a rocky hillside into a dense birch grove during the golden hour. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path bordered by a rocky embankment and wildflowers under a partly cloudy sky. As he pauses, the camera rotates to reveal his face and the expansive, misty valley and distant hills behind him before he turns to continue his journey. The scene then shifts as the rocky terrain gives way to grassy banks, leading the character deeper into a thicket of white birch trees. Finally, the path winds through colorful undergrowth as dappled sunlight filters through the overhead canopy.
